title: damasonium polyspermum var. minimum
intro: Damasonium polyspermum var. minimum, also known as the least damasonium, is a variety of aquatic plant that belongs to the water lily family (Hydrocharitaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Damasonium polyspermum var. minimum include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and can be consumed as a tea or applied topically to affected areas.
